Our Teams

Toshiba’s involvement in a wide range of technological and business fields assures it can offer a career that matches your interests and helps you achieve your full potential.

R&D and Engineering Roles

ResearcherResearchers conduct fundamental researches that lead to future technology and products. We operate a global innovation network with R&D centers in Japan, US, Europe, and Asia.See role in the organization
Design & Development EngineerDesign & Development Engineers develop and design products. Engineers are required to understand emerging trends in products in the market, apply benchmarking techniques against competitors to form and execute development plans, and implement software and hardware designs that meet customer needs.See role in the organization
System EngineerSystem Engineers coordinate complex projects that develop, design and integrate information systems. Engineers work with customers and engineers to finalize system specifications that meet customer requirements and market needs.See role in the organization
Sales EngineerSales Engineers support sales and marketing activities with their technical knowledge and sales acumen by providing technical support and making suggestions from an engineering perspective.See role in the organization
Manufacturing EngineerManufacturing Engineers undertake R&D in manufacturing technology and advance Toshiba group's capabilities in fundamental areas as production systems technology, high-density packaging, optical technology and quality control.See role in the organization
Quality Control EngineerQuality Control Engineers maintain and improve the quality and reliability of Toshiba's products and services by managing resources allotted to each stage of product development, which includes product planning, design and development, manufacturing, procurement and sales.See role in the organization

Researcher

Researchers conduct fundamental researches that lead to future technology and products. We operate a global innovation network with R&D centers in Japan, US, Europe, and Asia.

Design & Development Engineer

Design & Development Engineers develop and design products. Engineers are required to understand emerging trends in products in the market, apply benchmarking techniques against competitors to form and execute development plans, and implement software and hardware designs that meet customer needs.

System Engineer

System Engineers coordinate complex projects that develop, design and integrate information systems. Engineers work with customers and engineers to finalize system specifications that meet customer requirements and market needs.

Sales Engineer

Sales Engineers support sales and marketing activities with their technical knowledge and sales acumen by providing technical support and making suggestions from an engineering perspective.

Manufacturing Engineer

Manufacturing Engineers support sales and marketing activities with their technical knowledge and sales acumen by providing technical support and making suggestions from an engineering perspective.

Quality Control Engineer

Quality Control Engineers maintain and improve the quality and reliability of Toshiba's products and services by managing resources allotted to each stage of product development, which includes product planning, design and development, manufacturing, procurement and sales.

Business and Administrative Roles

Finance & AccountingFinance & Accounting division supports top management with financial strategies that has an important influence in driving Toshiba’s profit growth.See role in the organization
Human Resources & AdministrationHuman Resources & Administration division partners with business operations in many perspectives such as talent acquisition, employee relationships, organization development in order to provide an environment maximize employees’ performances and link to company growth.See role in the organization
ProcurementProcurement division procures of items, parts and components with designated quality and quantity at low cost to support the manufacturing process for Toshiba’s factories located in Japan and all over the world.See role in the organization
Sales & MarketingSales & Marketing division plans business strategies to achieve sales goal and to develop new customers and businesses. Major customers include government, public offices, other manufactures and companies.See role in the organization

Finance & Accounting

Finance & Accounting division supports top management with financial strategies that has an important influence in driving Toshiba’s profit growth.

Human Resources & Administration

Human Resources & Administration division partners with business operations in many perspectives such as talent acquisition, employee relationships, organization development in order to provide an environment maximize employees’ performances and link to company growth.

Procurement

Procurement division procures of items, parts and components with designated quality and quantity at low cost to support the manufacturing process for Toshiba’s factories located in Japan and all over the world.

Sales & Marketing

Sales & Marketing division plans business strategies to achieve sales goal and to develop new customers and businesses. Major customers include government, public offices, other manufactures and companies.
